CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Type__c, "Event"),IMAGE("/resource/Impact_Icons/plannersm.png", "Event", 25, 25)+" ",NULL)+ IF( RecordType.Name = "Need" && !ISPICKVAL(Type__c, "Event"),IMAGE("/resource/Impact_Icons/needsm.png", "Event", 25, 25)+" ",NULL)+ IF( RecordType.Name = "Offer" && !ISPICKVAL(Type__c, "Event") ,IMAGE("/resource/Impact_Icons/giftsm.png", "Event", 25, 25)+" ",NULL)+ IF(!ISBLANK(Contact__c), HYPERLINK("/"+ Contact__c, Contact__r.FirstName + " " + Contact__r.LastName + IF(Right(Contact__r.LastName, 1)="s", "'", "'s")), IF(!ISBLANK(Organization__c), HYPERLINK("/"+ Organization__c, Organization__r.Name + IF(Right(Organization__r.Name, 1)="s", "'", "'s")),"")) + " " + IF( ISPICKVAL(Type__c, "Event"), "Event", RecordType.Name) + IF(!ISBLANK(Posted_By__c), BR() + IF(Contact__c = Posted_By__c, "", "(Posted by " + HYPERLINK("/"+ Posted_By__c, Posted_By__r.FirstName +" " + Posted_By__r.LastName) + ")") , "")
CustomField.label: Posting Details
